license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ibxcapn
title: Propidium Iodide (PI) Staining Method
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm

steps_raw.instruction: Make a sample by adding 25% glycerol to cells Samples can be stored at -20ºC for 30 days. Glycerol growcells.com Catalog #MRGE-4002
Add DAPI at 50 µg/mL in dH 2 O
Add PI at 500 µg/mL in dH 2 O
Filter sterilize with 0.2 µm Millipore filter and store in the dark at 4ºC
Dilute cells appropriately according to your sample
Add DAPI at a final concentration of 5 µg/mL
Add PI at a final concentration of 3 µg/mL
Incubate in the dark for 30 min
Filter sample onto a 0.2 µm black polycarbonate filter under low vacuum (<15 mmHg)
Mount the filter onto a glass slide with low fluorescence immersion oil
View the sample under the Leica DM4000-6000 epifluorescent microscope under the Texas Red N3 filter at green excitiation = 546 nm and emission = 600 nm
